subject: Re: [chatmcp/mcpso] Submit Your MCP Servers here (Issue #1)
body:
jorkal-crypto left a comment (chatmcp/mcpso#1)

**Jorkal NFT Data MCP Server**

https://github.com/jorkal-crypto/jorkal-nft-mcp

MCP server for real-time Solana NFT market data. Tools: floor price, listings, collection stats, wallet holdings. Paid via x402 micropayments (USDC on Base mainnet).

MCP endpoint: https://jorkal-nft-mcp.vercel.app/mcp
